series_metadata.series_description: Contains all documents related to the completion of polygraph examinations conducted for department or external agency pre-employment processing including the release and waiver (HP24G), polygraph results, associated reports, audios or video files, and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in OSHP Central Records for seven years from date of exam. ; Electronic: Retain in network directory attached to OSHP Central Records for seven years from date of exam., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
